name: lithe-css
description: A lightweight, class-based, modular CSS framework.

scripts.build:base: postcss src/lithe-base.css -o dist/lithe-base.css && postcss src/lithe-base.css -o dist/lithe-base.min.css --env production
scripts.build:extended: postcss src/lithe-extended.css -o dist/lithe-extended.css && postcss src/lithe-extended.css -o dist/lithe-extended.min.css --env production
scripts.build:full: postcss src/lithe.css -o dist/lithe.css && postcss src/lithe.css -o dist/lithe.min.css --env production
scripts.build: npm run build:base && npm run build:extended && npm run build:full && node -e "require('node:fs').copyFileSync('src/js/lithe.js', 'dist/lithe.js')"
scripts.check: node scripts/check.mjs && npm run api:check && npm run baseline:check
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run check
